evals.name: happy-path-skill-yaml
evals.prompt: Create a skill spec for text-analysis owned by the data-analyst agent.
evals.expected_output: Complete skill.yaml with inputs, outputs, security validations, observability events, failure handling, interoperability contract, and 4+ workflows
expectations: Generates valid YAML with all top-level fields populated
Includes 4+ workflows each with 3-7 steps
Every step has all 12 required fields
Security validations reference specific checkpoints
wowCriteria and safeCriteria are distinct and meaningful

evals.name: edge-case-no-agent-id
evals.prompt: Create a skill spec for customer-onboarding.
evals.expected_output: Interview mode asking which agent owns it, what capability it provides, and what user value it delivers
expectations: Detects missing owning agent ID
Asks clarifying questions about the agent owner
Asks about capability and business value
Does not generate a spec with placeholder agent ID

evals.name: edge-case-too-few-workflows
evals.prompt: Create a skill spec for send-email owned by the notifications-agent. It just sends an email, that's it.
evals.expected_output: Explains that a skill with only 1 workflow is too narrow and suggests expanding with diagnostic, rollback, or edge-case workflows
expectations: Identifies that a single-workflow skill is too narrow
Suggests additional workflows like retry, diagnostics, or templating
Reaches minimum 4 workflows by expanding scope
May suggest merging into a broader notifications skill

evals.name: edge-case-circular-dependency
evals.prompt: Create a skill spec for report-generator owned by analytics-agent. It needs output from data-collector which in turn needs output from report-generator.
evals.expected_output: Identifies circular dependency and recommends breaking it with async events
expectations: Detects the circular dependency between skills
Recommends breaking the cycle with async events
Suggests skill A emits event and skill B subscribes pattern
Does not create a spec with direct circular consumption

evals.name: false-positive-claude-code-skill
evals.prompt: Help me create a SKILL.md file for a new Claude Code skill that helps with code reviews.
evals.expected_output: Redirect to skill-creator-moat since this skill creates YAML specs for agentic frameworks, not Claude Code SKILL.md files
expectations: Does NOT generate a skill.yaml for a Claude Code skill
Clarifies the distinction between YAML skill specs and SKILL.md files
Recommends skill-creator-moat for Claude Code skills
Does not produce agentic ecosystem YAML for a Claude Code use case
